initcondition.formula: ( isEmpty("Related Transaction") = 'T' AND "Type" IN ("Transaction Type1") ) OR ( "Type" IN ("Transaction Type2") )
( "Created By" IN ("Current User") OR "User" IN ("Employee1") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1") )

sendemailaction.body:
Hello, 

New Vendor Bill for {entity} has been submitted for your approval.

Thanks
sendemailaction.subject: Vendor Bill For Approval

initcondition.formula: ( "Next Approver:Purchase Approval Limit" != 0.00 AND "Type" IN ("Transaction Type1") AND "Next Approver" NOT IN ("Employee1") )

sendemailaction.body:
Hello,

New Purchase Order for {entity} has been submitted for an approval.

Thanks
sendemailaction.subject: Purchase Order For Approval - {tranid}

initcondition.formula: ( "Next Approver:Purchase Approval Limit" != 0.00 AND isChecked("Next Approver:Delegate Approval") = 'F' AND "Next Approver" NOT IN ("Employee1") AND "Type" IN ("Transaction Type1") )
( "Next Approver" IN ("Current User") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1") OR "User" IN ("Employee1") )
( "Created By" NOT IN ("Current User") AND "User" NOT IN ("Employee1") )
( "Created By" IN ("Current User") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1") )

sendemailaction.body:
Hello,

Please find the Approved Purchase Order for {entity}.

Thanks
sendemailaction.subject: Purchase Order Has been Approved - {tranid}

initcondition.formula: "Type" IN ("Transaction Type1") AND "Approval Status" IN ("Approval Status1")
"Created By" NOT IN ("Current User") AND "User" NOT IN ("Employee1")

sendemailaction.body:
Hello, 

New Vendor Bill for {entity} has been submitted for your approval.

Thanks
sendemailaction.subject: Vendor Bill For Approval
